generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, I've always believed in supporting our nation's strategic autonomy. But have we considered the real trade-offs? While independence sounds appealing, over-reliance on our own systems could leave us vulnerable during crises. Look at Germany's recent struggles with energy independence - they had to reverse course when faced with shortages. We must balance autonomy with pragmatic partnerships to ensure our security. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
